privileged_info_summary: The chinook-java project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/chinook-java. A Git merge of the 'main' branch into 'feature/playlist-export' creates conflicts in three files: Track.java, PlaylistService.java, and pom.xml. Track.java contains conflicting changes: the feature branch adds a toCsvRow() method while main adds a getStreamingQuality() method and StreamingQuality enum. PlaylistService.java has conflicting changes: the feature branch adds an exportToCsv() method while main adds a getPlaylistDuration() method. The pom.xml file has a conflict between the opencsv dependency (feature) and the gson dependency (main). All metadata claims regarding the project directory, conflicted files, required methods, and required dependencies have been verified against the setup script logic and confirmed through actual Git merge testing.
